/opt/homebrew/bin/arm-none-eabi-gcc -mcpu=cortex-m4 -mthumb -mfloat-abi=soft -ffreestanding -nostdinc -isystem /Users/carlosdasilva/Codes/proof_systems/thesis/groth16_poseidon_assembly/bare_metal/include -isystem /opt/homebrew/Cellar/arm-none-eabi-gcc/16.1.0/lib/gcc/arm-none-eabi/16.1.0/include -nostartfiles -nostdlib -T/Users/carlosdasilva/Codes/proof_systems/thesis/groth16_poseidon_assembly/bare_metal/stm32f405.ld -nostartfiles -nostdlib -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,-Map=cross_validate_arm.map CMakeFiles/cross_validate_arm.dir/test/cross_validate.c.obj CMakeFiles/cross_validate_arm.dir/bare_metal/startup.c.obj -o cross_validate_arm  -Wl,--start-group libgroth16_verifier.a lib/relic/lib/librelic_s.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/arm-none-eabi-gcc/16.1.0/lib/gcc/arm-none-eabi/16.1.0/thumb/v7e-m/nofp/libgcc.a -Wl,--end-group
